name: stackra/invoice
purpose: Invoice lifecycle — Invoice + InvoiceLine + CreditNote aggregates modelling money-owed records and refund/write-off reversals.
capabilities: InvoiceLine aggregate (ivl_ prefix) — per-invoice line item
when_to_use: A tenant issues an invoice to a customer, or a credit note for a refund/adjustment.
when_not_to_use: For the double-entry ledger of money movement, use stackra/transaction. For SaaS-plan invoicing, use stackra/subscription.
